name: Human-in-the-Middle
description: Human input mock (mouse/keyboard) for urisys-node. A tellmesh capability pack adopted into urirun via its manifest (`urirun adopt-pack`): 8 him:// routes mapped 1:1 to bindings.v2, validated, ready to project to MCP tools / A2A skills.
useCases: Address him:// capabilities as URIs in a flow.
Project Human-in-the-Middle operations to MCP tools / A2A skills.
Adopt the pack with one command, no code change.
requires: the tellmesh 'urihim' pack (GitHub) for real handlers; dispatch works simulated without it
